title: Craftable Trident - The Craftables Series
body:
# The Craftables Series

![The Craftables Series](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TheCraftableSeries/BH_NU_HEADER.webp)

![About](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TheCraftableSeries/BH_NU_BANNER1.webp)

**The craftable series mods aim to make some uncraftable items in Vanilla Minecraft craftable, to make YOU choose what features you want in your server.**

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TheCraftableSeries/BH_NU_BANNER2.webp)

**Simple but effective, makes the trident craftable.**

![Bisecthosting Buy A Server](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TheCraftableSeries/BH_NU_PROMO.webp)
